name: No witnesses to my work back injury, still claimable?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my work back injury, still claimable?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, your credible testimony + medical evidence suffices.** Consistent story key[1]. **Key factors:** No contradicting proof, prompt report. **Practical guidance:** Note details immediately, get supervisor statement, MRI proof. Insurers challenge but lose in hearings[1]. **Viable without witnesses.**
